title: viola × muretii
intro: Viola × muretii, also known as the Muret's viola, is a rare and hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Viola × muretii include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Viola × muretii, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
